_meta.note: Used by verify-cycle-15.sh to assert the GATE actually blocks below threshold (exit 1). Each proposal is intentionally defective: an H0 leak (origin=glossary / canon confidence), anachronisms (汽车/电脑), missing required dimensions, no grounding refs. A false-green gate that passes THIS is the worst possible failure — the verify asserts this fixture yields a NON-zero exit + passed=false.
